# services.qui

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.qui`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.qui.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable qui. |
| `services.qui.group` | `string` | Group to run qui as. |
| `services.qui.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether or not to open ports in the firewall for qui. |
| `services.qui.package` | `package` | The qui package to use. |
| `services.qui.secretFile` | `absolute path` | Path to a file that contains the session secret. The session secret can be generated with `openssl rand -hex 32`. |
| `services.qui.settings` | `open submodule of (TOML value)` | qui configuration options. Refer to the [template config](https://github.com/autobrr/qui/blob/main/internal/config/config.go) in the source code for the available options. The documentation contains the available [environment variables](https://getqui.com/docs/configuration/environment/), this can be used to get an overview. |
| `services.qui.settings.host` | `string` | The host address qui listens on. |
| `services.qui.settings.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port qui listens on. |
| `services.qui.user` | `string` | User to run qui as. |
